name: Uppercase
author: Taako
description: A Red DiscordBot cog for creating and renaming text channels with uppercase-style names.
install_msg: Uppercase loaded. Use `[p]create-channel <category> <name>` or `/create-channel`, and `[p]rename-channel <channel> <name>` or `/rename-channel`.
short: Create and rename uppercase-style text channels.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any end user data.
